final_prompt.prompt:
Create a marketing poster / PPT cover slide for a domestic China roadshow fundraising event announcing "GPT5.5发布", with presenter Sam Altman, styled to match Chinese GP (General Partner) investor pitch aesthetics.

Style/medium: clean editorial presentation slide design, flat vector layout with photorealistic portrait inset, inspired by top-tier Chinese PE/VC roadshow decks (think Sequoia China / Hillhouse pitch deck visual language)
Composition: centered landscape layout, bold headline at top third, presenter portrait (Sam Altman) anchored bottom-right or lower-left, logo/badge element top-left, generous white or dark navy space for hierarchy
Subject: PPT cover slide announcing "GPT5.5发布" launch, featuring Sam Altman as keynote speaker, positioned as a landmark AI financing roadshow event targeting Chinese LPs and GPs
Scene/backdrop: abstract deep navy or ink-black background with subtle circuit-node or data-flow texture, conveying technological authority and institutional gravitas
Lighting/mood: cool blue and gold accent lighting, authoritative and forward-looking, institutional confidence without flashiness
Color palette: deep navy or charcoal as base, gold or electric blue as primary accent, white for headline text — palette signals premium Chinese financial institution taste
Materials/textures: matte flat background with subtle geometric line-art overlay, photorealistic portrait of Sam Altman with clean edge treatment
Text (verbatim): "GPT5.5发布" as hero headline; "演讲人：奥特曼" as speaker credit line
Constraints: must read clearly as a projected slide at 16:9 ratio; all Chinese text must be legible at presentation scale; layout must follow Chinese roadshow convention — event title dominant, speaker name and title clearly labeled, institutional logo placeholder top-left
Avoid: Western startup pitch aesthetic; neon cyberpunk colors; cluttered infographic elements; cartoon or illustrated portrait style; generic Canva template look
